patch:
@@ -30,15 +30,20 @@
 # https://github.com/rollingrock/Fallout-4-VR-Body/wiki/FAQ#is-hiding-the-head-prevents-getting-hit-in-the-head
 
 # Hide the head geometry by name (values in FRIK_Mesh_Hide\face.ini)
-HideHead = true
+# Warning: this will affect the shadow of the player, making it headless. check fHeadBackPositionOffset for alternative.
+bHidePlayerHead = false
 
 # Hide Equipment geometry by name (values in FRIK_Mesh_Hide\slots.ini)
-HideEquipment = true
+bHidePlayerHeadEquipment = true
 
 # Hide skin/clothes geometry by name (values in FRIK_Mesh_Hide\skins.ini)
-HideSkin = false
+bHidePlayerSkin = false
 
-# If to ignore hide HideHead, HideSkin, and HideEquipment when in selfie mode
+# How much to offset the head back to prevent it from clipping the player view (default: 4)
+# Better than hiding the whole head as it removes the shadow
+fHeadBackPositionOffset = 5
+
+# If to ignore hide bHidePlayerHead, bHidePlayerHeadEquipment, bHidePlayerSkin, and fHeadBackPositionOffset when in selfie mode
 bSelfieIgnoreHideFlags = true
 
 
@@ -64,12 +69,12 @@ armLength = 36.000000
 bIsPlayingSeated = false
 
 # HMD and Body offsets
-fPlayerHMDOffsetUpStanding = 8
-fPlayerBodyOffsetUpStanding = -3
+fPlayerHMDOffsetUpStanding = 8.6
+fPlayerBodyOffsetUpStanding = -4.2
 fPlayerBodyOffsetForwardStanding = -3
-fPlayerHMDOffsetUpSitting = 31
+fPlayerHMDOffsetUpSitting = 36
 fPlayerBodyOffsetUpSitting = -4
-fPlayerBodyOffsetForwardSitting = 2
+fPlayerBodyOffsetForwardSitting = -3
 
 # HMD and Body offsets in PowerArmor
 fPlayerHMDOffsetUpStandingInPA = 23
@@ -81,8 +86,8 @@ fPlayerBodyOffsetForwardSittingInPA = -9
 
 # Hack to handle comfort sneak affecting the height of the player without real-world body change. By setting static
 # body pitch the body position doesn't change, making it easier to handle skeleton related things like Virtual Holsters.
-# Default: 30, set to 0 to disable and use regular body pitch calculation
-fComfortSneakHackStaticBodyPitchAngle = 30
+# Default: 10, set to 0 to disable and use regular body pitch calculation
+fComfortSneakHackStaticBodyPitchAngle = 10
 
 
 ### Pipboy Settings
@@ -277,4 +282,4 @@ sDebugFlowText2 =
 sDebugDumpDataOnceNames =
 
 # Internal use for versioning
-iVersion = 12
+iVersion = 13

@@ -1,13 +0,0 @@
-#ifndef	FRIK_VERSION_INCLUDED
-#define FRIK_VERSION_INCLUDED
-
-#define MAKE_STR_HELPER(a_str) #a_str
-#define MAKE_STR(a_str) MAKE_STR_HELPER(a_str)
-
-#define FRIK_VERSION_MAJOR	0
-#define FRIK_VERSION_MINOR	74
-#define FRIK_VERSION_PATCH	0
-#define FRIK_VERSION_BETA	3
-#define FRIK_VERSION_VERSTRING	MAKE_STR(FRIK_VERSION_MAJOR) "." MAKE_STR(FRIK_VERSION_MINOR) "." MAKE_STR(FRIK_VERSION_PATCH) "." MAKE_STR(FRIK_VERSION_BETA)
-
-#endif
